infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FoodLog uses the camera to capture meal photos for nutritional analysis. Photos are uploaded directly and never saved to your camera roll.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FoodLog can optionally pick existing meal photos from your library if you choose 'From Library'.

plugins.cameraPermission: FoodLog uses the camera to capture meal photos for nutritional analysis.

plugins.photosPermission: FoodLog can optionally pick existing meal photos from your library.
